overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through Night City at night on wet highways. The journey transitions from dense urban overpasses with neon billboards to the rocky Red Peaks canyon and finally opens into desert wasteland approaching a radar dome outpost. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with holographic advertisements and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with concrete overpasses

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed through urban highway underpasses, following traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: vehicle with red taillights traveling in same direction ahead on the highway

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure with multiple support columns
illuminated green highway signs indicating directions to North Oak and City Center
tall digital billboard displaying red and white neon advertisements
tall street lamps illuminating the highway with warm orange light
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle view driving under massive concrete highway overpasses in a dense cyberpunk city. Neon billboards and street lights illuminate the wet asphalt road while futuristic skyscrapers line the horizon. The camera follows a vehicle ahead through the urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with digital advertising towers

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed on open highway, weaving slightly between lanes while navigating past other vehicles

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with brake lights on, maintaining position ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: tall structure with multiple stacked digital screens showing advertisements
gantry-mounted directional signs spanning across the highway lanes
metal safety barriers running along the sides of the elevated highway
large advertising screens mounted on metal framework over the road

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges from under the overpasses onto an open elevated highway lined with massive digital billboards and advertising towers. The urban skyline remains visible on the left while the road stretches ahead with metal guardrails. The scene maintains the high-speed urban traversal with moderate traffic presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon highway with billboards mounted on stone walls

events.description: overtaking a large pickup truck on the right side of the highway
entering Red Peaks area as rocky canyon walls rise on both sides of the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the rocky canyon section, overtaking a large truck on the right while maintaining high speed

notable_agents.action: large pickup truck being overtaken on the right, traveling slower than the motorcycle

entered.detail: tall natural rock formations flanking both sides of the highway creating a canyon effect
digital advertisement screen mounted directly on the rocky cliff face
distinctive yellowish dome structure visible in the far distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions dramatically as the highway enters the Red Peaks area, with natural rock walls replacing urban buildings. The motorcycle overtakes a large pickup truck on the right while digital billboards mounted on the rocky cliffs flash by. A distinctive radar dome becomes visible in the distant desert ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway approaching radar dome outpost

events.description: exiting rocky canyon into open desert wasteland with sparse vegetation

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed across the open desert highway approaching the illuminated dome structure

entered.detail: illuminated CHOOH2 fuel station sign glowing in the desert darkness
tall electrical transmission towers stretching across the desert landscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast desert wasteland under a dark sky, with the rocky canyon falling behind. The motorcycle approaches a distinctive radar dome structure that dominates the center of the frame, while gas station signs and power poles dot the sparse landscape. The highway continues straight toward the illuminated outpost.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle journey that transforms from a dense, neon-lit urban corridor into a desolate desert wasteland. It begins by weaving under massive concrete highway overpasses where neon billboards reflect off wet asphalt and futuristic skyscrapers loom on the horizon. As the camera emerges from the urban infrastructure, the scene opens onto an elevated highway lined with towering digital advertisements and a sprawling city skyline. The environment then shifts dramatically as the road enters the Red Peaks, where natural rock walls replace the buildings and digital signs are mounted directly onto cliffs, before the motorcycle overtakes a large pickup truck. Finally, the rocky canyon falls away to reveal a vast desert under a dark sky, with the highway stretching straight toward a dominating radar dome and sparse outpost structures.
